repository.description: The full name of the repository (owner/name).

id.description: The database ID of the comment.

node_id.description: The Node ID of the comment.

discussion_number.description: The number of the discussion this comment belongs to.

discussion_url.description: The URL of the discussion this comment belongs to.

body.description: The body content of the comment in Markdown.

body_html.description: The body content of the comment rendered as HTML.

created_at.description: The date and time when the comment was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the comment was last updated.

is_answer.description: Whether this comment has been chosen as the answer.

upvote_count.description: The number of upvotes on the comment.

author_association.description: The association of the comment author with the repository.
